name: WT Financial Group Limited
summary: WT Financial Group Limited provides a range of financial services. It operates in two segments, Financial Planning, Investment Advice and Product Sales; and Accounting and Taxation Services. The company provides financial advice and solutions, including superannuation investments, insurance, finance, equities, and direct and SMSF residential and commercial properties to retail and wholesale clients. It also offers licensing, compliance, education and training, and technical support services; and practice management and development services, including consumer marketing and education tools. In addition, the company provides wealth management, retirement, investment, and financial advice; mortgage and finance advice; buyers agency and real estate advice; and accounting and tax advice and compliance services for investors and small to medium businesses, as well as operates as an investment and asset manager of a disability housing fund. The company was formerly known as Spring FG Limited and changed its name to WT Financial Group Limited in November 2019. WT Financial Group Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.
